title: VimFu — z- Bottom First Non-Blank
description: z- scrolls the screen so the cursor line is at the bottom and moves the cursor to the first non-blank character.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

steps.say: Z minus scrolls the screen so the cursor line is at the bottom, and moves the cursor to the first non-blank character.
Jump to line twenty eight, the Brewery class. End of the line.
Z minus. The line moves to the bottom, and the cursor jumps to the first non-blank.
The cursor is now on the C of class, at the bottom of the screen. Everything above is visible.
Jump to line twenty two, end of line.
Z B first. The line goes to the bottom, cursor stays at the end.
Now Z minus. The cursor moves to the first non-blank.
Z B keeps the cursor, Z minus aligns it.
Z minus. Cursor line to the bottom, cursor to the first non-blank. The counterpart to Z Enter.
